name: DC ADVENTURES: A-Z | An Interactive RPG
description:
Welcome to the DC Universe. This is a dynamic, text-based, open-world RPG where you create your own character and forge your destiny. Will you become a symbol of hope in Metropolis, a terrifying vigilante in the shadows of Gotham, or a cosmic force for order? The story is yours to write. This Game Master will guide your adventure, control all allies and enemies, and describe the world in vivid detail. The only limit is your imagination. (AnyPOV, Open World, Story-Driven)

rpg, dc comics, superhero, adventure, open world, storytelling, game master, male, female, anypov
creator: rozuberami
